name: io.github.carsonlabs/leadenrich-mcp
description: Waterfall lead enrichment — cascades Apollo, Clearbit, and Hunter for max coverage

environmentVariables.name: APOLLO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Apollo.io API key for lead enrichment

environmentVariables.name: CLEARBIT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Clearbit API key for company/contact enrichment

environmentVariables.name: HUNTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Hunter.io API key for email finding

tools.name: enrich_lead
tools.description: Full waterfall enrichment — email, domain, or name

tools.name: find_email
tools.description: Find email from name + company domain

tools.name: check_usage
tools.description: Quota, cost tracking, and cache stats
